dungeon: RotMG private-server run branded **'Void Realm' (v0.11.1)** — NOT confirmed to be the ROTF (Revenge of the Fallen) target server. ('Welcome to Void Realm!', 'Void-Realm 0.11.1', scheduled 'Going in 3 mins!' events.) A multi-dungeon session (6 boss climaxes) through Undead/Abyss/ice/desert biomes. SERVER-IDENTITY FLAG: the captured bosses are almost all BASE-GAME RotMG (Lich, Abyss demons, Big Pit Imp) plus one possibly-server-custom 'Elemental Discharge' — so this tag's value for the ROTF project is LOW and its content must NOT be auto-built as ROTF-custom without confirming Void Realm == ROTF.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-frames+minimaps: a multi-dungeon hop — a BLUE-TILED ice/stone arena with yellow caution-tape-bordered inner rooms (green slime adds), an ORANGE/RED LAVA arena (Abyss of Demons style, checkered lava floor) where the demon bosses are fought, and SAND/DESERT + grass realm sections. Standard RotMG dungeon layouts (room-and-corridor); no distinctive custom arena geometry captured.

mechanics: SERVER-IDENTITY / PROVENANCE FLAG (the main point of this entry): the footage is from a RotMG private server branded **'Void Realm' v0.11.1**, which is NOT confirmed to be the ROTF target server this project rebuilds. The bosses captured are overwhelmingly BASE-GAME RotMG (Lich, Big Pit Imp + Abyss demons Ogre/Butcher, Dr Terrible Bubble — the last already in our build via Lab.cs); only 'Elemental Discharge' is possibly server-custom, and if so it is VOID-REALM-custom not ROTF. Therefore: do NOT auto-build any of this as ROTF content. RECOMMENDATIONS: (1) determine whether 'Void Realm' is the same server as ROTF or a distinct private server before trusting any of its footage as ROTF evidence; (2) re-audit earlier 'Void'-themed recoveries (e.g. the 'Void Entity' candidate from disc_dkyXVJtdX_Q) to confirm they came from the ROTF server and not from Void Realm — none of those names are in the build yet, so no contamination so far. Attacks captured (Abyss demon radial orange fire, Elemental Discharge charged lasers) are base-game/cross-server, low ROTF value.
uncertain: Whether 'Void Realm' == ROTF or a separate private server is UNRESOLVED (the branding says 'Void Realm', not ROTF) -> the conservative reading is a DIFFERENT server. Bosses are base-game so attribution is easy; 'Elemental Discharge' custom-ness is server-local. Some lines right-edge cut ('We are almost finished with the incantation. You a[re...]'). Attack geometry only approximate (base-game; not the focus).
confidence: HIGH that this is a 'Void Realm' private-server run of mostly BASE-GAME RotMG content (Lich/Abyss demons/Big Pit Imp + Dr Terrible Bubble) and therefore LOW value for the ROTF project. Recorded primarily to FLAG the server-identity/provenance question and prevent Void-Realm content from being mistaken for ROTF-custom. No new ROTF-buildable content. Best follow-up: confirm the Void Realm vs ROTF server identity and re-tag any prior 'Void' recoveries accordingly.
